text: The Storm Explorer is loaded with fetures to allow you to explore the paths of storms in the North Atlantic. In this tab, you will find some basic instructions on how to run the model.

To create one storm track (TBD):

1) Click on the “Storm Set-up” button in the bottom control bar.

2) Use the Storm Set-up panel to set the initial conditions of the storm.

3) When you are happy with the initial conditions, close the Storm Set-up panel.

4) Click “Start” to run the storm.

To create multiple storm tracks (TBD):

1) Click on the “Multiple Tracks” button in the bottom control bar.

2) Click on the “Storm Set-up” button in the bottom control bar.

3) Use the Storm Set-up panel to set the initial conditions of the storm.

4) When you are happy with the initial conditions, close the Storm Set-up panel.

5) Click “Start” to run the storm.

6) If you like this track, click the “Save” button in the Set-up panel.

7) Repeat several times.
